points.description: Switching between apps to complete one workflow fragments attention and kills momentum
evidence: Gloria Mark (UC Irvine) research: 23 minutes to refocus after interruption
Zapier State of Business Automation 2023: workers switch apps 25+ times per day

points.description: No clear way to see what matters most right now — everything feels equally urgent
evidence: Asana Anatomy of Work Index: 26% of workers feel unclear on daily priorities
Todoist productivity survey: priority overload cited by 58% of power users

points.description: Too many pings from the app itself interrupt deep work sessions the tool is supposed to enable
evidence: Microsoft WorkLab: excessive notifications reduce productivity 40%
Common complaint across G2 reviews of Jira, Asana, Monday.com

points.description: Too many clicks or modal dialogs required to capture a quick task idea while already in flow
evidence: GTD principle: capture friction causes ideas to be lost or deferred indefinitely
Linear quick-add keyboard shortcut cited as top retention driver in user interviews

points.description: No meaningful sense of overall momentum — daily work feels like running in place without visible throughput
evidence: Teresa Amabile's Progress Principle: small wins are the strongest intrinsic motivator
Notion user research: 'done' list and velocity charts among most-requested missing features

points.description: Unclear ownership, blockers, and handoffs cause tasks to stall without anyone noticing
evidence: Atlassian teamwork report: 36% of delays attributed to unclear responsibility
Linear and Height user reviews: assignee + status clarity cited as critical differentiators
